channel.title: Comments for page "The Show Must Always Go On"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Show Must Always Go On"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Ooohhh fuuuuuuck yessssss.

I love this and I clearly have no bias at all because that would be dumb. :P Seriously though this is great. It does indeed go into something neither Varaxous nor I thought of. If I were to voice one complaint, it's that this does a great job of showing how people are within the musical apocalypse, but doesn't expand on the lore of the skip at all. But that! Is a nitpick. This is a great interpretation of the events that would happen after the events of SCP-3713. Well done~!

item.title: Every heart sings a song, incomplete until another heart whispers back.
item.content:encoded:
Merry Christmas Varaxous!

Happy new years, everyone. Wishing all of you peace and contentment in 2019.
